purpose: Represent status, ownership, tags, linked entities, dates, files, and ratings as compact tokens that support scanning, filtering, and action.
inspiredBy: Fluent tags, persona, badge, and tag picker

devExtremePrimitives.role: Dense status and entity rendering in tabular data.
Select and edit multiple tags or owners.
Display object status and ownership in card summaries.
Single status, owner, or category selection.

validationRules: Do not rely on color alone; include text, icon, or tooltip meaning.
Use consistent status vocabulary across filters, cells, summaries, and forms.
Make tokens filterable when users scan dense data.

devExtremePrimitives.role: Entity preview with related metadata and actions.
Short entity hint or status explanation.
Structured preview or edit content inside a popover/drawer.

validationRules: Inline chips should not silently grant access or imply permissions.
Preview actions must be clearly scoped to the entity.
